---
author: Pranav
execute: 
    freeze: true
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: [serif,custom.scss]
        slide-number: true
        css: custom.css
        transition: slide
        transition-speed: default
        chalkboard: true
        margin: 0.1
---

# Parametric Study - Wiper cases - 10% Bounds

## Design Space for DoE

Density (1.23) = 1.107 to 1.353 g/cm^3^ 

Young's Modulus (3.605) = 3.24 to 3.96 MPa

Radius (2.43) = 2.187 to 2.673 mm

Twist in End Vector (0) = -10° to 10°

End Vector Deviation (0) = 0° to 10°

Length (163.32) = 146.988 to 179.652 mm

Sampled using LHS


## Wiper Position 1 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w1-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w1-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Wiper Position 2 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w2-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w2-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Wiper Position 3 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w3-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w3-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Wiper Position 4 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w4-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w4-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Wiper Position 5 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w5-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w5-doe-error >}}
:::
::::
